# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php

        // your code goes here
        return '';
    }
    
    function decrypt(string $encryptedData): string {
         // your code goes here
         return ''; 
    }
    
    echo "Encrypt: "; print_r(encrypt('My Data')); // Encrypt: Y29ubmNvZA== 
    echo "\nDecrypt:"; print_r(decrypt('Y29ubmNvZA==')); 
?>
